Last updated: 2026-04-05 04:07 UTC — Source on GitHub

Daily Operations → — Single combined box of everything to paste right now. Just keep running it.
How to use: Click a text box below to select its contents, then paste into QuickStatements. Each box shows up to 200 lines (~1 day's budget). Full files available via download links. Run in order: Phase 1 (add P459), then Phase 2, then each migration.

Phase 1: Add P459 qualifiers to existing P13723

Add P459 (determination method or standard) to all existing P13723 statements. Each rank value gets the correct determination method: Q712534 (modern), Q138640329 (Engishiki), Q135009120 (Ritsuryō), etc.

Duplicate Properties on Shikinai Ronsha

Due to a partial data migration that broke provenance, many Shikinai Ronsha items ended up with duplicate P361, P1448, and P6375 statements. The original source had bad data modelling, and correcting it in a way that broke provenance made the situation worse.

P361 (part of) — 385 items with duplicates

These duplicates are related to ordering in the Engishiki lists. The P361 and P1448 properties on these items tend to be highly property-heavy (many qualifiers and references). We could probably fix the P361 duplicates by walking through the lists again and reconciling.
